name: Helmerich & Payne, Inc.
summary: Helmerich & Payne, Inc. (HP) is a contract drilling company providing drilling services to oil and natural gas exploration and production companies. The company operates drilling rigs and recently completed an acquisition of KCA Deutag International Limited, expanding its international operations. HP offers contract drilling services across domestic and international markets.

products.name: Contract Drilling Services
products.description: Provision of drilling rigs and associated services to oil and natural gas exploration and production companies.
